data.content: can I visit the bank on a 4th Saturday at 2:00 PM?

Yes, you can visit the bank on the 4th Saturday at 2:00 PM, as most banks, including XYZ Bank, typically operate on that day from 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM. However, it is advisable to check the specific hours for your branch on the official website or contact customer support for any variations.
